overview: LoRA adapter (rank 32, alpha 64) for DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B. Trained on 10K NuminaMath-TIR examples for tool-integrated reasoning.
usage:
# Usage

Load with PEFT:
```python
from peft import PeftModel
model = PeftModel.from_pretrained(base_model, 'tantheta/r1-distill-qwen-32b-tir-lora/peft-lora-r32/1')
model = model.merge_and_unload()
```
